programmes.show_description: Street-cleaning twins Vinny and Pat tackle illegal dumping in Dublin. Paige and Shan blitz a luxury rental in Cork and decluttering duo Kim and Lyn tame a chaotic tween bedroom.
A team of detectives, led by Brian Tarpey travel to Moscow to interview Lugovoy and Kovtun, now the prime suspects behind Litvinenko's murder.
Dublin After Dark explores the efforts of members of An Garda Siochana to combat growing levels of anti-social behaviours on the streets of the capital. (SL)
After learning the mystery hit-man shot the wrong woman, Holly and her team race to identify the real target before she is killed.
This channel is currently off air.
Comment and analysis on the big stories of the day in Ireland and abroad with a panel of guests covering the key issues.
A lively mix of celebrity chat with national and international guests, fabulous food from the country's top Chefs, expert advice and all the unmissable stories making the headlines
Ireland AM is the longest running daytime show in Ireland. Blending a mixture of lifestyle interviews and news content, with gardening, health, food and fashion seven days a week.
A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more.
The latest national and international news stories from the Virgin Media News team, followed by sport and weather.
Day Three's card tests class and stamina, headlined by the Stayers' Hurdle and Ryanair Chase, plus the Mares' Hurdle.

Rachel agrees to be maid of honour at her ex-fiancé's wedding.
Graham gives Rhona a last chance. Arthur rejects Jai's offer of a job. Nicola is suspicious.
Jim's old army mates join Steve at his funeral, Adam's act of revenge puts Jodie on edge, Theo finds a new target, and Megan's love life intrigues Leanne.
Explosives Officer Lana Washington and her team find a man held captive in a cab with a note: Confess or Die. The race is on to uncover the bomber's identity and next target.
When a teen from a group home goes missing, the squad must quickly determine if he ran away or was abducted.
Donna makes some interesting admissions whilst being questioned.
A sinister inquiry into skeletal remains found in a forgotten Brighton storm drain takes Grace down a labyrinthine trail through the past.

Timing is everything. Paddy gets better news. Gabby gives Arthur a new strategy.
Maggie frets over Ben's hospital appointment, a defamatory article upsets George, Alya meets with her former boss, and Hope urges Sam to stand up to his bully.
